title: ETF Inflows Show Sustained Institutional Demand for Bitcoin
summary: On-chain and ETF flow data from CoinDesk Research indicate three consecutive weeks of net institutional inflows into BTC spot ETFs. Signal is directional but not yet at P1 threshold.

decision.reason: Passed candidate gate: confidence=0.62 (>=0.50), score=58 (>=40), source=coindesk (approved). Signal viable. Escalating to QuantLab review queue for human judgment.

state_transitions.reason: Candidate gate accepted: meets minimum viability thresholds. Confidence below ready_for_review threshold (0.75).

metadata.notes: Fixture: candidate outcome. score>=40 AND confidence>=0.50 AND confidence<0.75 → candidate.
